title: Dumbo Deaths
description: A resource pack that changes death messages to be better (and funnier!)
body:
![Dumbo Deaths](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76bdcf3b39adca277165aa2e3cdcfc6bc817ba39.png) ###
A resource pack that changes death messages to better (and sometimes funnier) variants!
--- Here are some examples! **- missed the jump** (dying from a small fall)
**- wandered too deep** (dying to a Warden)
**- angered the admins** (having a /kill used on you)
**- threw themselves at the ground and forgot to miss** (dying from a big fall)
**- ran through Mother's forbidden garden while playing with ** (being in combat with another player, and dying in a Sweet Berry Bush)
**- is now prepared nicely as a kebab** (dying on a Dripstone stalagmite)
**- took a leap of faith... and missed** (falling into the void)
